lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਤੁਠੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਆ ਹਮ ਕੀਏ ਸਬਦਿ ਨਿਹਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur tutthai naam drirraaeaa ham kee sabad nihaal |
lines.english: The Guru, in His Mercy, implanted the Naam within me; I am enraptured with the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਆਸਾ ਮਨਸਾ ਵਿਸਰੀ ਮਨਿ ਚੂਕਾ ਆਲ ਜੰਜਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabh aasaa manasaa visaree man chookaa aal janjaal |
lines.english: All my hopes and desires have been forgotten; my mind is rid of its worldly entanglements.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕਿ ਅਤੁਟੁ ਧਨੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਮਾਲੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak atutt dhan paaeaa har naamaa har dhan maal |2|
lines.english: Servant Nanak has obtained the inexhaustible wealth; the Lord's Name is his wealth and property. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਧਿਆਵਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਅਪਰੰਪਰੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇ ਹਰੇ ਤੇ ਹੋਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jo dhiaaveh har aparanpar har har har dhiaae hare te honaa |
lines.english: Those who meditate on the Infinite Lord, who meditate on the Lord, Har, Har, Har, are rejuvenated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਤੁਮੑ ਵਡ ਵਡੇ ਵਡੇ ਵਡ ਊਚੇ ਸਭ ਊਪਰਿ ਵਡੇ ਵਡੌਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: har tuma vadd vadde vadde vadd aooche sabh aoopar vadde vaddauanaa |
lines.english: O Lord, You are the Greatest of the Great, the Greatest of the Great, the Most Lofty and Exalted of all, the Greatest of the Great.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਸੁਣਹਿ ਤੇਰਾ ਜਸੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਤਿਨ ਕਾਟੇ ਪਾਪ ਕਟੋਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jo gaaveh suneh teraa jas suaamee tin kaatte paap kattonaa |
lines.english: Those who sing and listen to Your Praises, O my Lord and Master, have millions of sins destroyed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮ ਜੈਸੇ ਹਰਿ ਪੁਰਖ ਜਾਨੇ ਮਤਿ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਮੁਖਿ ਵਡ ਵਡ ਭਾਗ ਵਡੋਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: tum jaise har purakh jaane mat guramat mukh vadd vadd bhaag vaddonaa |
lines.english: I know that those divine beings who follow the Guru's Teachings are just like You, Lord. They are the greatest of the great, so very fortunate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਧਿਆਵਹੁ ਆਦਿ ਸਤੇ ਜੁਗਾਦਿ ਸਤੇ ਪਰਤਖਿ ਸਤੇ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਸਤੇ ਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਦਾਸੁ ਦਸੋਨਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sabh dhiaavahu aad sate jugaad sate paratakh sate sadaa sadaa sate jan naanak daas dasonaa |5|
lines.english: Let everyone meditate on the Lord, who was True in the primal beginning, and True throughout the ages; He is revealed as True here and now, and He shall be True forever and ever. Servant Nanak is the slave of His slaves. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਜਗਜੀਵਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿਓ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਮੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: hamare har jagajeevanaa har japio har gur mant |
lines.english: I meditate on my Lord, the Life of the World, the Lord, chanting the Guru's Mantra.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Salok, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਬਿਅੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: har aape ghatt ghatt varatadaa har aape aap biant |
lines.english: The Lord Himself is pervading each and every heart; the Lord Himself is Endless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਅਗਮੁ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਅਗਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਆਇ ਅਚਿੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: har agam agochar agam har har miliaa aae achint |
lines.english: The Lord is Unapproachable, Inaccessible and Unfathomable; the Lord, Har, Har, has spontaneously come to meet me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਸਭ ਰਸ ਭੋਗਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਕਵਲਾ ਕੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: har aape sabh ras bhogadaa har aape kavalaa kant |
lines.english: The Lord Himself enjoys all pleasures; the Lord Himself is the Husband of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਭਿਖਿਆ ਪਾਇਦਾ ਸਭ ਸਿਸਟਿ ਉਪਾਈ ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: har aape bhikhiaa paaeidaa sabh sisatt upaaee jeea jant |
lines.english: The Lord Himself gives in charity to the whole world, and all the beings and creatures which He created.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦੇਵਹੁ ਦਾਨੁ ਦਇਆਲ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਹਰਿ ਮਾਂਗਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਸੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: har devahu daan deaal prabh har maangeh har jan sant |
lines.english: O Merciful Lord God, please bless me with Your Bountiful Gifts; the humble Saints of the Lord beg for them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਜਣੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਮੈ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਰੀਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: har prabh sajan naam har mai man tan naam sareer |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord God is my Best Friend. My mind and body are drenched with the Naam.

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਆਇ ਮਿਲੁ ਹਮ ਗਾਵਹ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਛੰਤ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jan naanak ke prabh aae mil ham gaavah har gun chhant |1|
lines.english: O God of servant Nanak, please come and meet me; I sing the Songs of the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਆਸਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪੂਰੀਆ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਣਿ ਹਰਿ ਧੀਰ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sabh aasaa guramukh pooreea jan naanak sun har dheer |2|
lines.english: All the hopes of the Gurmukh are fulfilled; servant Nanak is comforted, hearing the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਊਤਮੁ ਹਰਿਆ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਮਉਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: har aootam hariaa naam hai har purakh niranjan maulaa |
lines.english: The Lord's Sublime Name is energizing and rejuvenating. The Immaculate Lord, the Primal Being, blossoms forth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜਪਦੇ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਰਾਤਿ ਤਿਨ ਸੇਵੇ ਚਰਨ ਨਿਤ ਕਉਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: jo japade har har dinas raat tin seve charan nit kaulaa |
lines.english: Maya serves at the feet of those who chant and meditate on the Lord, Har, Har, day and night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਬੂਝੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਆਪਿ ਬੁਝਾਇਸੀ ਜਿਸੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਉਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: so boojhai jis aap bujhaaeisee jis satigur purakh prabh saulaa |
lines.english: Those whom the Lord inspires to understand, understand; the True Guru, God, the Primal Being, is pleased with them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਤ ਸਾਰਿ ਸਮੑਾਲੇ ਸਭ ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਹਰਿ ਵਸੈ ਨਿਕਟਿ ਸਭ ਜਉਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: nit saar samaale sabh jeea jant har vasai nikatt sabh jaulaa |
lines.english: The Lord always looks after and cares for all His beings and creatures; He is with all, near and far.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਗਾਵਹੁ ਗੁਣ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਹਰੇ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਹਰੇ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਹਰੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਤ ਗੁਣੀ ਸਮਉਲਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: sabh gaavahu gun govind hare govind hare govind hare gun gaavat gunee smaulaa |6|
lines.english: Let everyone sing the Praise of the Lord of the Universe, the Lord, the Lord of the Universe, the Lord, the Lord of the Universe; singing the Praise of the Lord, one is absorbed in His Glorious Virtues. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਤਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਚੇਤਿ ਮਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sutiaa har prabh chet man har sehaj samaadh samaae |
lines.english: O mind, even in sleep, remember the Lord God; let yourself be intuitively absorbed into the Celestial State of Samaadhi.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Salok, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਚਾਉ ਮਨਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਤੁਠਾ ਮੇਲੇ ਮਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jan naanak har har chaau man gur tutthaa mele maae |1|
lines.english: Servant Nanak's mind longs for the Lord, Har, Har. As the Guru pleases, he is absorbed into the Lord, O mother. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਇਕਸੁ ਸੇਤੀ ਪਿਰਹੜੀ ਹਰਿ ਇਕੋ ਮੇਰੈ ਚਿਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: har ikas setee piraharree har iko merai chit |
lines.english: I am in love with the One and Only Lord; the One Lord fills my consciousness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਇਕੁ ਅਧਾਰੁ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਇਕਸ ਤੇ ਗਤਿ ਪਤਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak ik adhaar har prabh ikas te gat pat |2|
lines.english: Servant Nanak takes the Support of the One Lord God; through the One, he obtains honor and salvation. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚੇ ਸਬਦ ਵਜੇ ਮਤਿ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਅਨਹਦੁ ਵਜਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: panche sabad vaje mat guramat vaddabhaagee anahad vajiaa |
lines.english: The Panch Shabad, the Five Primal Sounds, vibrate with the Wisdom of the Guru's Teachings; by great good fortune, the Unstruck Melody resonates and resounds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨਦ ਮੂਲੁ ਰਾਮੁ ਸਭੁ ਦੇਖਿਆ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਗੋਵਿਦੁ ਗਜਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aanad mool raam sabh dekhiaa gurasabadee govid gajiaa |
lines.english: I see the Lord, the Source of Bliss, everywhere; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, the Lord of the Universe is revealed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦੇਵਹੁ ਦਾਨੁ ਦਇਆਲ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜਨ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਲਜਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: har devahu daan deaal prabh jan raakhahu har prabh lajiaa |
lines.english: O Merciful Lord God, please bless me with Your Bounty; O Lord God, please preserve and protect the honor of Your humble servant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਜੁਗਾਦਿ ਵੇਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਏਕੋ ਮਤਿ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਭਜਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aad jugaad ves har eko mat guramat har prabh bhajiaa |
lines.english: From the primal beginning, and throughout the ages, the Lord has One Form. Through the Wisdom of the Guru's Teachings, I vibrate and meditate on the Lord God.
